c.d: The ability for users to rate and review movies, providing personal insights and opinions.
The app's capability to suggest movies based on user preferences and viewing history.
Options to connect with friends, share ratings, and see friends' activities.
Tools to create and manage lists of movies to watch or already watched.
Information on where to stream or purchase movies.
The design and usability of the app, affecting ease of navigation and overall user satisfaction.
The availability of the app across different operating systems and devices.
Measures taken to protect user data and privacy.
Information on whether the app is free, ad-supported, or requires a subscription.
The ability to sync with other platforms or services, such as streaming accounts or social media.
